patch.value: Promote annotation and link primitives to the public SDK: comments, notes, learnings, files, docs, deps, linked tests

Typed SDK functions for all item facets — comment CRUD, notes/learnings append+list, file/doc link management, dependency edges, linked-test registration and execution hooks. Duplicate check: no existing annotation-primitive SDK item.

SDK exports typed facet primitives with identical validation/governance to the CLI; facet commands consume only these primitives; docstrings + linked tests + SDK reference docs; zero behavior change (facet specs green)

value.author: maintainer-agent
value.text: Scope note (audit 2026-07-05): this promotion also owns the append (body-append) primitive — it is an annotation-family write like notes/comments. Execution of linked tests is explicitly NOT here; that is pm-oslr.

author: claude-code-agent
